name: send_email
description: Send a transactional email to one or more recipients. Supports HTML and plain text bodies, file attachments, template rendering with dynamic data, custom headers, and scheduled delivery. Perfect for order confirmations, password resets, notifications, and personalized communications.

parameters.name: personalizations
parameters.description: An array of objects defining recipients and per-recipient settings. Each object can contain 'to', 'cc', 'bcc', 'subject', and 'dynamic_template_data' for personalized content.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: The sender's email address and optional display name. Example: {"email": "sender@example.com", "name": "Acme"}

parameters.name: subject
parameters.description: Global subject line (can be overridden per personalization). Use handlebars syntax for dynamic content: {{subject_variable}}

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: Email body content as an array with 'type' and 'value'. Include both 'text/plain' and 'text/html' for best compatibility.

parameters.name: template_id
parameters.description: SendGrid Dynamic Template ID to use for rendering the email. Overrides the 'content' field. Use with dynamic_template_data for personalization.

parameters.name: dynamic_template_data
parameters.description: JSON object containing variables for template substitution. Keys match handlebars placeholders in the template.

parameters.name: attachments
parameters.description: Array of attachments. Each object should have 'content' (base64-encoded), 'type' (MIME type), and 'filename'.

parameters.name: mail_settings
parameters.description: Advanced mail settings like sandbox mode, click tracking, and open tracking. Example: {"sandbox_mode": {"enable": false}, "click_tracking": {"enable": true}}

parameters.name: reply_to
parameters.description: The reply-to email address for recipients. Example: {"email": "support@example.com"}

parameters.name: headers
parameters.description: Custom email headers as key-value pairs. Example: {"X-Custom-Header": "value"}

body.message: Email accepted for delivery. No body returned.
